---
title: Real-time fault tracking and ground motion prediction for large earthquakes with HR-GNSS and deep learning
date: '2023-01-01'
author: [Jiun-Ting Lin, Diego Melgar, Valerie J Sahakian, Amanda M Thomas, Jake Searcy]
publication: 'Journal of Geophysical Research: Solid Earth, **12**, _e2023JB027255_ (2023).'
categories: [environment]
url_source: 'https://agupubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1029/2023JB027255'
url_preprint: ''
journ: 'Journal of Geophysical Research: Solid Earth'
issue: 12
page: "e2023JB027255"
year: 2023
image: ''
pub_number: 12
---
